footer.aboutText: Karaoğlu Universal Mühendislik has been undertaking pioneering projects in the construction, engineering, and mechanical systems sectors with its quarter-century of experience.

slider.subtitle: The Region's Strong Infrastructure and Superstructure Solution Partner
slider.title: We Build Government Investments with Diligence
slider.slide2_subtitle: From Ankara to Turkey; 10+ years of experience, strong machinery park and financial adequacy
slider.slide3_subtitle: We have our signature on projects from the Silk Road Coastal Band to TOKİ Housing

about.subtitle: Why Us?
about.title:
THE RELIABLE SOLUTION PARTNER FOR
PUBLIC PROJECTS IN
VAN AND ANKARA
about.desc1: Karaoğlu Universal Mühendislik carries out public contracting works throughout Turkey with its offices based in Ankara and Van.
about.desc2: Our company has successfully completed 64 projects to date, most of which consist of construction and engineering works for public institutions.
about.desc3: We act with 'state seriousness' in construction, infrastructure and superstructure projects; delivering Hospital, School, TOKİ housing and Road projects on time.

services.housing: TOKİ Housing: Mass Housing in Van and Surrounding Provinces

slogan.text: "Reliability, technical competence and on-time delivery guarantee in public projects."
slogan.author: — Karaoğlu Universal Mühendislik

cta.title: CONTACT
cta.desc: You can contact our Ankara or Van office for public projects and technical consultancy services.
